Hospital Number: 9990004
NHS Number: 9990000004
MATTEO ROSSI
Male
25/02/1943 Age: 82 Years | 62 DAY TARGET: 06/05/2025

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: ADENOCARCINOMA, NOT OTHERWISE SPECIFIED 
ICD10 Code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla 
Differentiation:  Moderately differentiated | Staging: T3 N0 M0 
Integrated TNM Stage: I     
Dukes:

Feb 2025 – adenocarcinoma of low rectum with deficient MMR 
MRI stage: T2 N0 EMVI negative ISP involved CRM clear PSW clear 
CRT to downstage 

6 week MRI – staging unchanged but of low signal and may represent complete response

Plan: for 10 week MRI and fleci sig

MRI 1/3/25: Persistent low signal, may represent complete response 
Flexi sig: scar seen

Outcome: to see surgeon, for discussion with patient RE entering watch and wait
